## Description

<!-- Clearly explain what this PR changes and why -->

## Type of change

<!-- Put an `x` in the boxes that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality improvement
- [ ] CI / tooling change

## Checklist

<!-- Put an `x` in every box that applies.  PRs that don't satisfy this checklist may be closed. -->

- [ ] My code follows the existing style of the project (`pnpm format:check` passes)
- [ ] The project builds without errors (`pnpm build` passes)
- [ ] I have added / updated tests where applicable (`pnpm test:run` passes)
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation where necessary

## Related issues

<!-- Link any related issues with "Closes #<number>" or "Fixes #<number>" -->
